filesystem.description: Secure file operations for RAG Enterprise codebase
filesystem.note: Core MCP - always enabled for token efficiency

git.description: Git repository operations and code search
git.note: Core MCP - always enabled for token efficiency

serena.description: Semantic code retrieval and editing (LSP-based) - 🎯 GAME CHANGER for token efficiency
serena.note: Core MCP - Saves 95% tokens on code retrieval with semantic search

subAgents.note: Specialized MCP servers moved to sub-agents for token efficiency and parallel processing

crawling-agent.description: Web crawling, scraping, and data acquisition

frontend-agent.description: Frontend development with React, Tailwind, and debugging

data-agent.description: Database operations and data management, advanced PostgreSQL
data-agent.note: postgres-mcp: Natural language→SQL, schema analysis, query optimization

code-review-agent.description: GitHub integration and code review, AST pattern analysis
code-review-agent.note: ast-grep-mcp: AST-based structural code search, pattern matching

rag-agent.description: RAG system optimization - embeddings, chunking, search, hybrid code search
rag-agent.note: mcp-ragex: Semantic+AST+Regex hybrid search | code-index-mcp: Auto indexing 16,500+ lines

testing-agent.description: Automated testing - unit tests, integration tests, coverage, code quality
testing-agent.note: mcp-code-checker: Auto pylint, pytest, mypy checks

deployment-agent.description: Deployment and DevOps - Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, container management, K8s orchestration
deployment-agent.note: docker-mcp: Manage 17 Docker services | kubernetes-mcp: K8s cluster (HPA 3-20 replicas, auto-scaling)

monitoring-agent.description: Performance monitoring - metrics, logs, alerts, profiling

priority_1_no_api_key.description: No API key required - use freely
priority_1_no_api_key.phase1_additions: mcp-ragex, code-index-mcp, mcp-code-checker, postgres-mcp, docker-mcp, ast-grep-mcp
priority_1_no_api_key.phase1_1_additions: kubernetes-mcp (corrected - k8s directory exists with 13 deployment files)

priority_2_free_tier.description: Free tier available - optional for enhanced features

setup.tavily: Get free API key at https://tavily.com (1000 requests/month free)

reason.brave-search: Paid API ($5/month minimum) - use self-crawling instead
reason.google-drive: Complex OAuth setup - use local filesystem instead

metadata.description: Token-optimized MCP configuration with Phase 1.1 - main project uses 3 MCPs, sub-agents use 16 MCPs with progressive disclosure
metadata.architecture: Main project (3 MCPs: filesystem, git, serena) + Sub-agents (16 MCPs across 8 agents) for parallel processing
metadata.token_strategy: Keep main context minimal with semantic code search (Serena saves 95% tokens), delegate specialized tasks to sub-agents with lazy loading
metadata.phase1_mcps: 6 MCPs: mcp-ragex, code-index-mcp, mcp-code-checker, postgres-mcp, docker-mcp, ast-grep-mcp
metadata.phase1_1_correction: Added kubernetes-mcp (missed in Phase 1 - k8s/ directory exists with 13 K8s deployment files including HPA auto-scaling 3-20 replicas)
metadata.kubernetes_deployment: k8s/ directory with 13 YAML files: api, postgres, qdrant, redis StatefulSets, HPA, ingress, configmap, secrets
metadata.serena_info: https://github.com/oraios/serena - Semantic code retrieval and editing via LSP
